title: Financial Services, Wealth and FinTech Intelligence
summary: Banking, wealth, insurance, financial AI agents, portfolios, customer intelligence, and regulated enterprise systems.
claims: Joz has substantial financial-services experience across wealth, insurance, banking portals, investment products, and financial AI agents.
His experience spans customer-facing products, internal systems, data-informed experiences, and current agentic AI work.
He has worked across Singapore, APAC, Europe, and the USA.
proof_points: MarketClue financial AI agents with live data and asset portfolios.
Maybank–Ageas Etiqa wealth and insurance transformation.
Manulife ML-enabled customer and investment experiences across APAC and North America.
Erste Bank engineering and internal/digital portal work at 16M+ customer scale.
Singapore Stock Exchange responsive listings portals.
